a.xlink:title: True if this process is running a slave.
True if this process is running the master.
Returns whether any mapping is defined.
return the one m2n, a ReceivedPartition can only have one m2n
Number of ranks. This includes ranks from both participants, e.g. minimal size is 2...
Tag mesh in first round accoring to all mappings.
Tag mesh in second round accoring to all mappings.
Scatters a communication map over connected ranks on remote participant (concerning the given mesh) ...
Sets _bb to the union with the mesh from fromMapping resp. toMapping, also enlage by _safetyFactor...
Receives a mesh from the sender with given rank. Adds received mesh to mesh.
Current rank.
Getter dimension of the bounding box.
Sends a constructed mesh to the receiver with given rank.
Checks if vertex in contained in _bb.
Expand bounding box using another bounding box.
Increase the size of bounding box by safety margin.
Return data as std::vector.
Returns the name of the mesh, as set in the config file.
Creates and initializes an Edge object.
Returns the unique (among vertices of one mesh on one processor) ID of the vertex.
Creates and initializes a Triangle object.
Creates and initializes an Edge object or returns an already existing one.
Returns the base ID of the mesh.
Returns modifiable container holding all edges.
Returns modifieable container holding all vertices.
Returns modifiable container holding all triangles.
Returns the (among edges) unique ID of the edge.
Returns spatial dimensionality of vertex.
Returns the coordinates of the vertex.
Helper function for 'createOwnerFunction' to set local owner information.
